verse.name: v1
verse.lines: King of kings, Majesty God of Heaven living in me Gentle Saviour, closest friend Strong Deliverer, beginning and end All within me falls at Your throne

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your Majesty, I can but bow I lay my all before You now In royal robes I don't deserve I live to serve Your Majesty.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Earth and Heaven worship You Love eternal, Faithful and True Who bought the nations, ransomed souls Brought this sinner near to Your throne All within me cries out in praise.
